# propose [IMPLEMENTED]

## Status

Implemented — this is a real `hotam` CLI subcommand; running it does something.

## Canon

§Proposal

## Purpose

Usage: hotam propose <requirement|rejection|stakeholder> [flags] [--domain <path>] [--today YYYY-MM-DD] [--out <path>] [--land] [--claude-md <path>] [--json]. Drafts valid proposal JSON from flags (schema knowledge in the tool, not agent memory), runs an automatic confront check before writing, and optionally --land (apply+regen+reverify) in the same call. Complex kinds (Conflict, EntityType, …) keep the hand-authored-JSON path (hotam land <file.json>).
